---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for BrainBerry
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Darshan7887
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing. 

Example: "Children often lose track of which lessons they've completed because there's no visual progress indicator on the module selection screen."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

Example: "Add a progress bar or checkmark overlay on each module card showing completion percentage."

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

Example: "We could also use a star-rating system or a simple completed/not-completed badge."

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.

- **Target audience**: (e.g., children, parents, both)
- **Affected modules**: (e.g., Phonics, Parent Dashboard, all modules)
- **Priority**: (e.g., nice-to-have, important, critical)
